texto: SHINE JESUS - I have found, the more we point others to Jesus... the more His radiance shines through us. "Those who are wise will shine like the brightest of heavens, and those who turn many to righteousness will shine like stars forever and ever." Daniel 12:3
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Paul Cobb: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “SHINE JESUS - I have found, the more we point others to Jesus... the more His radiance shines thr…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspirational-quotes, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
